content_body: We absolutely love, love, love this cabin! It is beautiful, inside and out. We couldn't have chosen a better place to have stayed. We had only come for a weekend getaway, but would now like to come back for a much longer stay. We would love to come for Thanksgiving or Christmas and hopefully see some snow. Again, we love this home!!! Thank you! <3 ~The Gays
title: We Love This Home!
